hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); { echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] whitespace-cleaner"; echo "  File: ${f:-<none>}"; if [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ]; then sed -i '' 's/[[:space:]]*$//' "$f" && echo '  🧹 trailing whitespace stripped'; else echo '  (no file path)'; fi; echo ""; } | tee -a ~/.claude/hook-output.log | tail -4
hooks.description: Strip trailing whitespace from the written/edited file

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.sh|*.zsh) { echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] zsh -n"; echo "  File: $f"; if out=$(zsh -n "$f" 2>&1); then echo '  ✓ syntax OK'; else echo "$out" | sed 's/^/  ✗ /'; fi; echo ""; } | tee -a ~/.claude/hook-output.log | tail -10 ;; esac
hooks.description: Syntax-check shell scripts with zsh -n (shellcheck does not support zsh)

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in */AGENTS.md|AGENTS.md) { echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] validate-agent-rules"; echo "  File: $f"; if [ -x .claude/commands/validate-agent-rules.sh ]; then .claude/commands/validate-agent-rules.sh "$f" 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  /'; else echo '  ⚠️  validator not available'; fi; echo ""; } | tee -a ~/.claude/hook-output.log | tail -10 ;; esac
hooks.description: Validate AGENTS.md against the Agent Rules spec
